description: Black and red backpack with printed branding at frontA zipped pocket at front with an insert pocket that has a velcro closureTwo zipped compartmentsA mesh stash pocket at each side with an elasticated mouthPadded backTwo soft and padded shoulder straps that are adjustable, printed branding on one of themAn extension detail in the main compartment that can be stored away with a zipped flapA soft haul loop at the top
